steps.title: Identify the noun phrase structure
steps.content: The blank is a noun phrase that comes after the and before the participial modifier associated with the Black Arts movement. The context mentions multiple writers (Henry Dumas and Ntozake Shange), indicating a plural context.

steps.title: Apply number agreement
steps.content:
”Works of other writers” correctly uses plural forms for both nouns without possessive apostrophes—the standard construction when a plural main noun requires a plural noun in its prepositional phrase.

Choices A, B, and D use singular possessive forms (work's or writer's) that violate number agreement.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
